productDisplayName: Indigo Nation Men Reversible Bling Red Shirts
description: Composition Reversible shirt in reddish bronze and maroon, made of a cotton blend fabric, with a tipped collar, front buttoned placket, full length sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a curved hemline Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Hand wash or machine wash cold using mild detergent Do not wring or bleach Flat dry in shade Do not iron on print Bling that adds immense style to your casual look is what indigo nation brings into your life. But what makes this shirt even better is that you can wear it inside out or outside in and change your colour code to suit the occasion. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with formal pants, denims or corduroys and black footwear for stylish formal and casual looks. Model statistics The model wears size 40 in shirts Height: 6; Shoulders: 18
